title: Comprehensive ashwagandha community wisdom research compiled from Reddit (r/nootropics, r/supplem...
content: Comprehensive ashwagandha community wisdom research compiled from Reddit (r/nootropics, r/supplements, r/herbs), LongeCity forums, and herbalist practitioners. Document covers: (1) Common experiences including benefits, side effects, individual variation patterns, and timelines; (2) N=1 experimentation protocols for testing, cycling, dosage finding, and tracking markers; (3) Practical tips on brands, timing, preparation; (4) Unexpected findings including emotional blunting, withdrawal effects, PCOS paradox, and combinations; (5) Long-term use patterns from multi-year users. Key insights: extreme individual variation (miracle vs nightmare), emotional blunting/anhedonia real but not in clinical studies, quality critical due to heavy metal bioaccumulation, significant thyroid effects (T3/T4 boost), SSRI-like withdrawal possible, extract differences matter (KSM-66 energizing vs Sensoril calming), 8-12 weeks on/1-2 weeks off cycling most common. Brands: Nootropics Depot, Jarrow, Himalaya recommended. Created: ashwagandha-community-wisdom.md
